plugins.description: Clean-code quality gates, commit/PR-to-dev helper, validation-error fixer, design-to-code translator, a roadmap planner, an autonomous product-manager that drives roadmap stories end-to-end, and a pr-review-report skill that emits an interactive HTML PR review with project memory.
